title: marcgraviastrum cuneifolium
intro: Marcgraviastrum cuneifolium, also known as the 'monkey mask' or 'monkey face', is a species of flowering plant in the Marcgravia family, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Marcgraviastrum cuneifolium include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its leaves and stems. The health benefits of this plant include treating various skin conditions such as acne, wounds, and ulcers, as well as reducing fever and alleviating pain. Herbal preparations of Marcgraviastrum cuneifolium include tea, infusions, and extracts, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
